title: poa sylvestris
intro: Poa sylvestris, also known as the woodland meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Poa sylvestris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Poa sylvestris typically involve the use of its leaves and stems to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
